title: Academy at Sab Rufo
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Academy at Sab Rufo''',<ref name="GG4, 1st ed.">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''</ref> also known as the '''Sab Rufo Academy''',<ref name="Planets of the Galaxy v. 1">''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]''</ref> was an academic institution from which [[Obo Rin]] claimed to have graduated with two doctoral degrees. He also claimed to be Director of [[Sentientologist|Sentientology]] there. These were among the credentials which led the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to commission him to write the ''[[Catalog of Intelligent Life in the Galaxy]]''.<ref name="GG4, 1st ed." />

[[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Herrit]], who was suspicious of Rin, did a background check on him. His investigation led him to believe that the Academy, and for that matter the planet [[Sab Rufo]], did not actually exist. Although [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] aide [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Solistein]] claimed that Lord Vader had visited Sab Rufo, he did not definitively state that Rin was associated with it.<ref name="GG4, 1st ed." />

The Academy at Sab Rufo operated an oceanographic research base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trieron]] in the [[Veron Minor system/Legends|Veron Minor system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="Planets of the Galaxy v. 1" />
